body.purpose: Primary reading text. Cap line length at 70ch.

label.purpose: Form labels, table headers, button text.

shadows.name: dialog-overlay
shadows.purpose: Soft ambient shadow on dialog content panels.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions — exponential ease-out.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary call-to-action. Signal Blue background, white text.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #2962ff; color: #fff; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 10px 20px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #1a45cc; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid rgba(41,98,255,0.3); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action. Transparent background, charcoal text.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #1a1a1a; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 10px 20px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease-out; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #e8e4df; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid rgba(41,98,255,0.3); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Text input with warm border. Focus shifts to Signal Blue.
components.css: .ds-input { background: #fff; color: #1a1a1a; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; padding: 8px 16px; border: 1px solid #d4cfc9; border-radius: 6px; width: 100%; transition: border-color 0.15s ease-out, box-shadow 0.15s ease-out; box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #2962ff; outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(41,98,255,0.15); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #999; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Surface container. Warm White on Warm Paper background, no shadow.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #fff; border-radius: 12px; padding: 24px; } .ds-card-text { font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; color: #1a1a1a; margin: 0; }

components.name: Admin Badge
components.description: Admin role badge. Signal Blue Muted background.
components.css: .ds-badge-admin { display: inline-block; background: #e8eeff; color: #2962ff; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 6px; }

components.name: Table Row
components.description: Table with warm muted header and clean row borders.
components.css: .ds-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; } .ds-th { background: #e8e4df; color: #1a1a1a; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 10px 16px; text-align: left; letter-spacing: 0.01em; } .ds-tr { border-bottom: 1px solid #d4cfc9; } .ds-tr:last-child { border-bottom: none; } .ds-td { padding: 12px 16px; font-size: 0.9375rem; color: #1a1a1a; }

narrative.overview:
CollegeLMS is a warm, calm administrative workspace — a tool that feels like a well-organized desk in a sunlit room, not a blinking dashboard in a server closet. Every screen prioritizes the task over the chrome. The interface recedes; the data steps forward.

The system rejects decorative clutter — no gradient text, no glassmorphism, no side-stripe borders. Hierarchy comes from generous whitespace, clear typographic scale, and a restrained accent color used precisely. The palette is warm-neutral with a single blue accent that signals interaction without demanding attention.
keyCharacteristics: Warm, not cold. Tinted neutrals replace pure grays
One accent color (blue), used on ≤15% of any screen. Its rarity is the point
Cards are real containers with generous radius, not flat rectangles
Tables are the default data display, not card grids

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: The primary accent covers ≤15% of any screen. Its rarity is the point — when blue appears, it means something.

rules.name: The Warmth Rule
rules.body: All neutrals carry a subtle warm tint (chroma ≥ 0.005, hue toward 60°). Pure gray (oklch(L 0 H)) is forbidden.

rules.name: The Weight-Only Scale
rules.body: Hierarchy is expressed through weight (500 → 600) and size, not through font family switches or letter-spacing theatrics.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. The tonal contrast between page and card backgrounds provides depth. Shadows appear only for modals and dropdown menus.

dos: Do use tinted neutrals (warm, chroma ≥ 0.005). Pure gray surfaces look unfinished.
Do keep Signal Blue coverage under 15% per screen. Blue means interactive.
Do use tables as the default data display — they scan faster than cards.
Do wrap forms and tables in cards for container consistency.
Do use generous whitespace between sections (32px+).
Do keep buttons at consistent height (38–40px).
Do show loading state as a centered spinner in the content area.
donts: Don't use #000 or #fff anywhere. Tint every neutral.
Don't add shadows to cards. Tonal separation is sufficient.
Don't use gradient text, glassmorphism, or side-stripe borders.
Don't put an accent border-left on cards. Use full borders or nothing.
Don't use zebra-striped tables. Subtle row borders are cleaner.
Don't stack identical card grids as a data display. Use tables.
Don't wrap everything in a card. The page background is the primary surface.
